ab: Gaga mniq sapah ka bubu rudan hug?
en: Is grandmother at home?

ab: Iq! Ga taqi tqiyan na hiya.
en: Yes, she’s sleeping in her room.

ab: Gaga mniq sapah ka bubu rudan hug?
en: Is grandmother at home?

ab: Ungac, wada nganguc suni da, musa keeman miyah sapah ka hiya.
ch: B:不在，她剛出去了，要晚上才回家。
en: No, she’s not. She just went out and will be back in the evening.

ab: Gaga mniq sapah ka tama rudan hug?
en: Is grandfather at home?

ab: Ga mniq qnpahan ka hiya, usa qnpahan miying hiya ka isu haw!
ch: B:他在田裡，你去田裡找他吧。
en: He’s upstairs. You can go up and find him.

ab: Niqan seejiq sapah?
en: Is anyone at home?

ab: Ma isu Walis, bsiyaq ku ini qita isu da! Ya su embiyax na hug?
ch: B:是Walis阿，很久沒有看到你了，你好嗎?
en: It’s Walis. I haven’t seen you in a while! How have you been?

ab: Malu hmi! Miyah ku miying sunan pprngaw.
en: I’m doing great! I came to chat with you.

ab: Gaga inu ka tama su hug?
en: Where is your father?

ab: Ga mniq hpuyan cmiyus damac ka hiya , musa ku lmawa hiya ha.
ch: B:他在廚房炒菜，我去叫他。
en: He’s in the kitchen cooking. Let me go call him.

ab: Ｗada inu ka Ubing da?
en: Where did Ubing go?

ab: Wada qadu rowdux qmraq rowdux da!
en: She went to the chicken coop to catch chickens.

ab: Tama rudan, Miyah nami da!
en: Grandfather, we’re here.

ab: Ungac sapah ka tama rudan namu, ga mniq qnpahan ka hiya, mniq sapah taga hiya ka yamu haw!
ch: B:你們的爺爺不在家，他在田裡，你們在家等他回來吧。
en: Your grandfather is not at home. He’s in the field. Wait for him to come back.

ab: Miyah su da nirih tama.
en: Uncle, you’re here!

ab: Sndamac balay, mdakil hnigan su da!
en: I haven’t seen you in a while. You’ve grown taller.

ab: Mqaras balay qmita sunan.
en: It’s so good to see you.

ab: Sbgay munan ka kalac nii, bsaan ruwan kulu huda ha.
ch: B:這是給你們的鳳梨，要放到冰箱裡。
en: Here’s a pineapple for you. Put it in the refrigerator.

ab: Bsiyaq ini miyah da, lmawa ku kana mnswayi miyah mkan idaw.
ch: A:這麼久沒來，我叫大家一起來吃飯。
en: It’s been a while. Let’s have a meal together.

ab: Ini huya , mimah ku ocya do malu da, emta strngan pprngaw.
ch: B:不用麻煩了，我喝茶就好，我們來客廳聊天。
en: No need to bother. I’ll just have tea. Let’s sit in the living room and chat.

ab: Mhuway su balay wah! Musa ku da!
ch: A:謝謝你的招待，我要回去了。
en: Thank you for your hospitality. I have to go now.

ab: Hndu smipaq sayang balay ka rowdux nii, dsi sapah su thuway mkan.
ch: B:這隻雞剛殺好，你帶回去慢慢吃。
en: This chicken was just freshly killed. Take it home and enjoy it slowly.
